query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS simulacoes_viagem (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  empresaId INT NOT NULL,
  veiculoId INT NULL,
  descricao VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  origem VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  destino VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  distanciaKm DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  valorFrete DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  custoTotal DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  margemBruta DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  margemPct DECIMAL(6,2) NOT NULL,
  detalhes JSON NULL,
  observacoes TEXT NULL,
  createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  createdBy VARCHAR(100) NULL
);
